sections: Canonical artifacts, renderer-derived views, and Projections
HCM-1.2 — Profile schema, artifact instances, and shipped default
HCM-0.6 exact shipped kind and root-profile data
HCM-1.1 additive kind/schema registry boundary proof gate

repo_truth: Read-only fresh review of the exact three-file uncommitted HCM-1.2 planning packet over clean baseline 0d73d31fd67f5ac26987bf1914133bfcc0bc33da after direct-parent remediation of review rounds 1 and 2. The current packet now supplies literal capability, nine-rule validator, condition, vocabulary, matcher, escalation, promotion, stack, schema, profile, and descriptor data; a request-wide schema document budget and bounded path/root contract; an internal determinate schema-shape query; exact vocabulary/Context Resolution registry module paths; and eighteen dependency-ordered S/M implementation increments of approximately five files or fewer. Independently derive the verdict from live authority and current bytes; do not inherit either prior review conclusion.
allowed_scope: Remain read-only and replay the sorted three-entry manifest and aggregate before review.
Review the complete HCM-1.2 SPEC, plan, and todo for independent implementability, exact authority, internal consistency, security, task ordering, verification, and scope discipline.
Read unchanged control-pack sections, HCM-0.6 decision, HCM-1.1 packet/handoff, live HCM-1.1 engine code/tests/assets, and official dependency docs only as needed.
Run read-only Markdown, link, Git, handoff/schema, source, package-topology, and feasibility checks.
Return findings first with exact file/line evidence through the built-in channel.
non_goals: No edits, staging, commits, new dispatches, global handoffs, ledger writes, or user task hops.
No Rust, Cargo, runtime asset, schema/definition publication, profile execution, setup/doctor/flow adoption, HCM-1.3+, or unrelated implementation.
Do not infer a product decision from examples/current enums/templates or weaken HCM-0.6 exact data.
Do not require an alternative merely as preference; identify a violated authority, invariant, gate, scope boundary, or concrete feasibility defect.
tasks: Invoke required skills in order, remain read-only, replay the exact three-entry manifest/aggregate, and return BLOCKED if any byte differs.

Review findings first in Critical, Required, Optional, Nit order. Every actionable finding must include severity, exact file/line, violated contract/invariant/gate, why it is wrong, smallest valid remediation, and missing verification.

Verify every claimed literal capability/validator/condition/vocabulary/Context-Resolution producer record is byte-complete: exact field names, types, values, order/bounds, identity derivation, fingerprint closure, and no behavior activation.

Verify request-wide document/root/path ceilings and fail-fast order are unambiguous and implementable on live HCM-1.1, the schema shape query is sufficient and safely bounded, and every task fits its exact allowed module/file scope.

Independently verify that every subordinate schema field/type/bound, every literal descriptor field, all eleven layerable profile fields, the complete typed source graph, and all exact resource ceilings are closed and implementable without inference.

Independently verify the packet has authority to select the shipped vocabulary/Context Resolution bytes, and that matcher/escalation/promotion typed metadata producers are exact, non-vacuous, non-executing, correctly deferred to HCM-3.2, and covered by positive/negative proof.
Verify HCM-1.2 is planning-only, consumes HCM-1.1 only as dependency/transition evidence, and does not activate implementation or HCM-1.3.

Verify SPEC/plan/todo agree on owner boundary, exact allowed files, source topology, public types, dependency producers, HCM-0.6 catalog/instances, task order, proof wall, classification ceiling, non-goals, and stop conditions.

Verify every exact identity or subordinate semantic decision introduced by the packet is authorized by the HCM-1.2 row/control pack rather than inferred from a conformance example or reserved user/product decision.
Verify the packet is implementable on the live HCM-1.1 owner boundary without opaque dependency fingerprints, mutable exact refs, ambient discovery, HCM-1.1 security weakening, or unbounded scope.

Verify the proposed first-party content schemas, constitutional capability/validator metadata, project condition, vocabulary, Context Resolution definition, six kind definitions, and shipped profile do not contradict HCM-0.6 unresolved-decision boundaries or HCM-2/HCM-3 ownership.

Verify binding-shape compatibility is machine-readable/non-vacuous, kind/instance authority stays separate, profile layering matches canonical replace-whole semantics, and all negative/security cases are sufficient.

Verify exact shipped catalog/instance set equality, unique constitutional root, conditional Environment Context, no root work/decision/risk instance, no legacy profile, and no setup/materialization claim.
Verify classification/gate promotions cannot exceed proof and every named gate that requires product adoption remains open.

Verify task granularity, dependencies, likely file scope, TDD order, cross-platform/package/security proof, fresh review loop, two-commit closeout, and todo entry state make a later implementation session executable.
Return CLEAN only if there is no valid Critical or Required finding; otherwise return CHANGES_REQUIRED or BLOCKED. Make no edits.
stop_conditions: Return BLOCKED if the manifest/aggregate, required authority, or required read-only verification cannot be reproduced.
Return CHANGES_REQUIRED rather than filling a reserved product/subordinate decision by inference.
Return to the parent if remediation would require Rust/runtime work, canonical 00-06 edits outside planning authority, HCM-1.3+, or broader human/product authority.
